# Vercel Geist Design References

These files are vendor references for the News Sentry frontend design baseline.
Keep the downloaded Markdown files unchanged; project-specific decisions belong in
`docs/design/news-sentry-geist-guidelines.md`.

## Sources

| File | Source URL | sha256 | Retrieved |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `design.md` | https://vercel.com/design.md | `17bec17b9a38461bbfb7181390e72ef0b5adc20bc4f9d9701f83deb03fbeade4` | 2026-06-29 |
| `design.dark.md` | https://vercel.com/design.dark.md | `492e9e6da17b64030c7786286e0223689f5d66b3fc4beca997f7a5673b59e706` | 2026-06-29 |

## Usage Boundary

- Treat these files as the upstream visual language reference: colors, typography,
  spacing, radii, shadows, components, motion, and content tone.
- Do not edit these files for News Sentry-specific mapping.
- News Sentry implements Geist through local tokens in `frontend/design-system/`.
- Fonts are self-hosted from `geist@1.7.2` and copied into
  `frontend/design-system/fonts/`.
